scene.message: Nanjo: The trouble at school{nl} is settled for now, but...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Dawdling in a place{nl} like this gets us nowhere!{waitkey}Come, let's get outside!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Why did they try to{nl} lock us in, I wonder?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Yo, Yukino. Long time{nl} no see!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: ...It hasn't really{nl} been that long, I'd think.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: You were there watching{nl} with us too, weren't you?{waitkey}{ret}
